title: 若駒Sの後に・『まぐれ』から

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... won? Against Teio? Me?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha, hahaha...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I don't believe it... Did I... really?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Awww, I lost!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Teio... I—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You just inspired me!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This is proof that I can get even faster! Hehe, I'm
already excited!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how much farther I have to go till I hit
my peak... Time to step it up and get there in a
flash!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wait...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: That was too close. I almost got cocky.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wake up, Nature. You just... got lucky.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Because, I mean... there's no way that...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I could shine brighter than she does.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I was when I won, of course. But...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This can't be anything but luck. I don't have what
it takes to be a winner.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it makes no sense. There's no way I'm
actually faster than Teio.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing about me that shines above the
pack. Something must have gone wrong.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I would win in a test of skill. If we
race again... I'll definitely lose.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah! I can't believe I thought I had actual
talent for a second there! I want to crawl into a
hole!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But Nice Nature did win, and it was her own abilities that brought about that victory. And yet...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Gosh, that's embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her lack of confidence in her abilities has caused
her to doubt her achievements and react as if she
lost today. In this case, what she needs is...
choice_data_list: Nature, do you wanna go on a little trip?
Nature, do you wanna go on a little trip?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: A trip? But why now?
choice_data_list: Let's go get a win this summer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a risky gamble to ask her to compete in the
Classics right now. She could lose what little
confidence she has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning at local races and steadily accumulating
wins will be better for her overall growth.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying... I'm not going to be competing in
the Satsuki Sho or Japanese Derby?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Because I'm not good enough?
choice_data_list:
Right now, we should focus on building your
confidence in your skills.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Right now, even if I won those races,
I wouldn't accept it.
choice_data_list: After this summer, you'll be even faster.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I hope that's the case.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then! Touring in a caravan is more my style,
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But we're not actually doing that, are we?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What kind of race are you thinking of?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A graded race that takes place in Kokura... the
perfect race for Nice Nature to gain some
confidence.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh, that one is the same distance as Wakagoma,
right? I think that's a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But summer in Kokura... Yay... I love sweating...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to aim for the Kokura Kinen
next!
